query: ("weather forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat warning" OR "weather alert" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "temperature prediction" OR "heat advisory" OR "heat index" OR "weather information" OR "climate information") AND ("cooling center" OR "cooling shelter" OR "heat refuge" OR "cooling station" OR "air conditioning center" OR "emergency shelter" OR "public cooling" OR "community cooling" OR "heat relief") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "heat-mortality" OR "temperature-health" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related death" OR "heat-related illness" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat wave mortality") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "instrumental variable" OR "causal inference" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "random assignment" OR "controlled study" OR "intervention study" OR "evaluation study" OR "impact assessment" OR "policy evaluation")
